languages.text: "Полагаю, не отменив Последний Приказ, я не смогу отдать следующий. А следующим будет приказ о передислокации".
"I believe that, unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."
languages.original_text: "Полагаю, не отменив Последний Приказ, я не смогу отдать следующий. А следующим будет приказ о передислокации".

traits.locale_text: "I believe that unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."
"I believe that unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."
"I believe that, unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."
"I believe that, unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."
"I believe that, unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."

languages.text: “我认为，如果不先撤销最后的命令，就无法下达下一个命令。而那条命令，就是要重新部署整个军团。”
languages.original_text: "I believe that, unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."

traits.locale_text: “我认为，如果不先撤销最后的命令，就无法下达下一个命令。而那条命令，就是要重新部署整个军团。”

languages.text: "Sanırım Son Emir'i iptal etmezsem bir sonrakini veremem. O da zaten yeniden konuşlanma emri olacak."
languages.original_text: "I believe that, unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."

traits.locale_text: "Sanırım Son Emir'i iptal etmezsem bir sonrakini veremem. O da zaten yeniden konuşlanma emri olacak."

languages.text: « Je crois savoir qu'à moins de révoquer l'Ordre ultime, je ne peux en donner un autre. Et cet autre ordre consisterait en un redéploiement. »
languages.original_text: "I believe that, unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."

traits.locale_text: « Je crois savoir qu'à moins de révoquer l'Ordre ultime, je ne peux en donner un autre. Et cet autre ordre consisterait en un redéploiement. »

languages.text: «Creo que, a menos que anule la orden final, no puedo darles una nueva. Y esa será un orden de reubicación».
languages.original_text: "I believe that, unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."

traits.locale_text: «Creo que, a menos que anule la orden final, no puedo darles una nueva. Y esa será un orden de reubicación».

languages.text: "Ich glaube, solange ich den letzten Befehl nicht aufhebe, kann ich den nächsten nicht erteilen. Und das wäre ein Verlegungsbefehl."
languages.original_text: "I believe that, unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."

traits.locale_text: "Ich glaube, solange ich den letzten Befehl nicht aufhebe, kann ich den nächsten nicht erteilen. Und das wäre ein Verlegungsbefehl."

languages.text: 「最後の命令を取り消さぬかぎり、私は次の命令を出せない、と理解している。そしてそれは、再展開の命令となるだろう」
languages.original_text: "I believe that, unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."

traits.locale_text: 「最後の命令を取り消さぬかぎり、私は次の命令を出せない、と理解している。そしてそれは、再展開の命令となるだろう」
